sources.title: International Dairy Foods Association: U.S. Frozen Dessert Demand Outlook 2025–2026
sources.summaryText: Post-promotional demand for U.S. small-brand ice cream typically softens 25–35% in the 4–6 weeks following SNS campaigns, with SNS-driven demand projections overshooting actual sell-through by an average of 28–34% for small producers.
sources.relevanceHintEn: The proposed order volume may exceed realistic sell-through if placed around or after the current SNS promotional cycle.
sources.relevanceHintKo: 현재 SNS 프로모션 주기와 함께 또는 이후에 주문이 이루어질 경우, 제안된 주문 수량이 실제 판매량을 초과할 수 있습니다.

sources.title: National Restaurant Association: Small F&B Business Operations Cost Benchmark — U.S. Market 2025
sources.summaryText: Procurement decisions based solely on promotional forecasts carry a 22% over-order rate risk for small F&B operators; safety stock should reflect trailing sales velocity, not projected demand.
sources.relevanceHintEn: Ordering based on promotional sales projections without trailing velocity data increases the risk of excess inventory that cannot be sold before expiry.
sources.relevanceHintKo: 실제 판매 속도 데이터 없이 프로모션 예측에만 기반하여 발주하면, 유통기한 전에 판매되지 못하는 초과 재고 위험이 증가합니다.

sources.title: Nielsen: U.S. Seasonal Ice Cream Consumer Trends and Small Brand Demand Patterns Q1 2026
sources.summaryText: Artisanal ice cream repeat purchase rates drop 40% after 60 days without new flavor rotation; single-flavor reliance increases demand concentration risk for small producers in the New York market.
sources.relevanceHintEn: Without upcoming flavor rotation, repeat purchase momentum supporting the projected demand may decline faster than forecast.
sources.relevanceHintKo: 향후 신규 맛 출시 계획이 없을 경우, 예측 수요를 뒷받침하는 재구매 모멘텀이 예상보다 빠르게 감소할 수 있습니다.

sources.title: USDA: Food Packaging Supply Chain Disruption and Lead Time Index Q4 2025
sources.summaryText: Ice cream cup and single-serve container lead times extended 18–24 days in Q4 2025 due to raw material shortages; operators with in-transit orders already placed should assess available storage capacity before committing additional purchases.
sources.relevanceHintEn: With 500 units already in transit, committing to an additional 1,000-unit order compounds storage pressure in a constrained supply chain environment.
sources.relevanceHintKo: 이미 500개가 배송 중인 상황에서 1,000개를 추가 주문하면, 공급망 불안 환경에서 창고 공간 압박이 심화될 수 있습니다.

sources.title: U.S. Department of Labor / NY DOL: Small Business Hiring and FLSA Compliance Guide 2025
sources.summaryText: New York minimum wage for food production workers is $16.00/hour (2025), with FLSA overtime after 40 hours; annual labor cost per production hire in New York averages $38,000–$45,000 including payroll taxes.
sources.relevanceHintEn: Annual labor cost for a new production hire must be evaluated against the current-year headcount budget and cash-flow capacity before committing.
sources.relevanceHintKo: 신규 생산직 채용의 연간 인건비는 당해 헤드카운트 예산 및 현금 흐름 여력을 고려하여 확약 전에 검토되어야 합니다.
